review_title: Expensive but awesome
description: With two substantially different audiences being targeted by our business, and a general need to do a better job of quickly connecting with promising leads, we've been quite pleased so far with Drift. We've already had several great opportunities arise thanks to the tool, and still have a large number of new bots to roll out, plus refinements to make based on our learnings from using the tool. As a supplement to our other inbound marketing efforts, I foresee chat through Drift being a substantial asset for a long while to come.
author: Rob C.
pros: With Drift, you can create customized chat experiences for users based on all sorts of criteria - the page they're on, the number of times they've visited, the channel they used to get to your site - and to target specific businesses with targeted messaging. Building the chat flows (Drift calls them "Playbooks") is generally quite easy, allowing you to quickly build out new bots once you get a hang of the platform. Drift also includes support chat built right into the product, meaning every time I get stuck, I'm able to reach out and get a hand from one of their product experts right away.
cons: We haven't been using Drift for that long, and there have already been a number of instances where I or one of the other users in the company have attempted to do something that seems obvious, only to find out the tool doesn't allow us to do so. We're always told that a feature request has been submitted, but there's no way to know how long it will take before we get whatever little tweak we're looking for in order to provide a smoother, more pleasant chat experience on our site.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gets the Job Done
description: Over the experience has been middle of the line. We have been considering other applications due to Drift being pretty expensive for what it offers. There are other applications out there that offer a lot more functionality in the chat flow.
author: Jessica W.
pros: I really like that is it easy to navigate. There are not a lot of places you need to go looking around to figure out what you need to do in order to change or update the flow of something.
cons: Their customer support is not great. They do not really offer any assistance when it comes to setup, or help with any of the technical processes or procedures. When we first started using this application we were unfamiliar with the targeting, and it would have been beneficial to have someone assist us with that.

review_title: A time consuming disappointment.
description: We asked very specific questions during the sales process (no trial available - this should have been a red flag) where the salesperson misrepresented the capabilities around integration, usability etc. There was plenty of 'sure it works just like that'. We would have identified this had a trial been available. Drift is expensive, has slick marketing, so I assumed it was good. I should have quit at this point, but had our developers work around the many issues and the 'ohh you need to pay 10x for that'. Support was very lackluster. Focused on upselling features already promised on the current plan. Our developers hated it (I should have listened)... Our salespeople did not like it, the bugs it Drift manifested in a form that made our salespeople look stupid to customers. They were actively creating workarounds to avoid using it. And here I am. Drift keep charging, and the support people 'can't find my cancellation request conversation' ironically, in Drift. So, let this be a warning for managers. Drift is really great at marketing, the halo effect is strong! But walk away and save time.
author: Nick S.
pros: Drift is a chat tool with some rudimentary marketing automation. Drift's bot workflows are conceptually good. Email 'playbooks' are similar to a basic marketing automation platform.
cons: I purchased Drift against the recommendation of our developers on the promise of its segment.io integration. Drift was buggy, did not work as described with segment.io and had numerous usability problems for end-users (customers).

review_title: Drift-The new way of conversational marketing!
description: Overall I can say we are satisfied with their services. It ultimately filters genuine leads from the universal traffic on the website and that too with high buying intent. Chat bot, Playbooks, Analytics and Integrations are just icing on the cake.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: -Playbooks- Setting up of chat bot and customizing it based on the page and target market becomes very easy with drift's playbook feature. You can very easily set up chat bot and start receiving genuine leads. -Analytics and Integrations- The deep analysis of the tool always keeps you on your toes and helps in pointing out various scope for improvement. You can also measure the efficiency of your chat agents as well. Also, it provides integration with your marketing CRM as well for lead handling purpose. -Customer Service- You are facing any issue with drift? Do not worry. Customer service is just a chat ping away. They are always attentive and help you proactively
cons: -Price- This was the main concern while evaluating various chat tools. Drift is follows a premium pricing which might not make it suitable for Small businesses. -No Forms- Drift takes pride on omitting the forms from the chat and enabling their conversational way of marketing. I think, they should make that optional. They should forms as well. -They should also have a feature in which chat transcripts can be emailed as well.

review_title: Best Conversion-Maximizing Method For Any Website
description: Drift allows me to communicate with clients and gauge the level of interest they have in our offerings. My end aim is to close a transaction, and Drift helps me do this by facilitating instantaneous communication with prospects and clients, allowing me to address their concerns and guide them toward a conclusive next step in the buying process.
author: Sarah H.
pros: Through Drift, I am able to contact with leads at the precise moment of their highest interest and engagement with the website, and to respond to their pressing queries immediately. Many of the talks I've had with potential clients have resulted in a sale.
cons: Forcing customers to provide email addresses before speaking with a representative. There is room for simplification in the reports and metrics. There are not further improvements needed.

review_title: Drift could be Intercom, but it isn't...
description: We decided to use Drift as means to provide support, but once we grow bigger than a single user, we'll have to move to a better platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We use Drift as an in-app messaging platform and it's decent at that. We considered using it for marketing automation, customer engagement and on-boarding, but it doesn't cut it.
cons: Even as an in-app messaging platform for support, there's room for improvement. A few months ago, they removed the option to "close a conversation" (which is essentially used to close a "support ticket"). For whatever reason, they think that it should be more like Whatsapp with an endless list of conversations that you can "archive". Only conversations sometimes come back (not because of new messages), they are sorted wrong so you may miss conversations with new messages, and you don't always get real time notifications in the mobile app.

review_title: The best chat AI.
description: Using this for sales as well as support automation, and it's paid off well and works with our sites.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The driftbots and playbooks (how their AI, automation is done). We have used this to automate sales workflows and schedule meetings and save time.
cons: I have no complaints that wouldn't be something out of my control - some of the rules I've set up in boys seem to be a bit too picky when leads respond with anything besides a picklist item.

review_title: Good Conversational Marketing Tool
description: Whether it's worth paying for tool like this will depend on how engaged your audience is and how big your traffic volumes are. We felt that for us the tool was not worth the money. There are much cheaper alternatives on the market if you're just looking for customer support tools.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lots of features that are likely to appear to enterprise B2B companies like lead routing, instant meetings booker, help centre article look up.
cons: Had issues with bugs in various areas several times and had to contact support and wait till they were resolved. Not very straightforward how to configure the tool in the best way and debug playbooks. Documentation could be better.

review_title: kickstart conversation marketing
description: It has been great but i believe much more integrated approach is needed.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: started using drift for our startup after moving away from HubSpot. It has been a great learning curve for us. Some aspects I love about drift is the lead tracking and bot performance. Also leveraging drift for email and phone converation as a CRM is a big plus. Also scheduling and calendar invites make is better than calendly
cons: Would love if drift can be an email server as well so that we can skip email server costs. It does most of the things already just needs a sync from gmail. It is very expensive especially since you have to pay upfront for the startup plan
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I use the free version for my consultancy
description: I have a side-hustle consultancy, and needed a way for my website visitors to get in touch. This was a really simple, free solution.
author: Mark A.
pros: Really simple setup, haven't had to touch a thing since implementing it.
cons: Having to switch between the app and the browser for different functionality - either have it all in app or dont.

review_title: Essential Automatiin Tool, Faster Time to Value with Inbounding
description: Excellent, would not have a solid inbound routing experience without a similar tool as Drift
author: Josh C.
pros: Conversation routing by Company HQ and State rather than just the site visitors geographic location. This is important since our sales team segments by Company HQ and Annual Revenue
cons: No ability to route countries other than US and Canada by state and/or territory. The entire continent of Australia can only be tagged as such in conversation routing. You have to build a playbook that asks the customer what territory they live in which creates a longer automated process for the site visitor. Also there is no option to segment by city which would be helpful for large city territories like Chicago, Dallas, Houston, Los Angeles, New York City, San Francisco etc

review_title: A solid component in your marketing automation strategy
description: Overall, I think it's a great tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really loved how super easy Drift is to both implement and use as chatbot tool (that does way more than that) we've rolled it out for our SDRs to be able to capture leads and respond to any presales questions quickly. and the integration with Hubspot and salesforce makes it really easy to not only capture but also to personalise our response as a part of our overall marketing automation strategy.
cons: - it's not cheap - the stage that you'd be importing the lead into Sales Cloud (SFDC CRM) can be tricky as the definition of stages aren't really aligned.

review_title: Live Chat Platform that suits my needs.
description: There has been a lot of platform development in recent years. Newer look and better android app for example. I remember when the Drift android app had quite a lot of bugs, but now many have been fixed. I am confident in future development and still choose Drift as my primary choice of Live Chat Platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Live chat and Playbook work well, and widgets are easy to install.
cons: There are no problems with functionality, but in my opinion, the customization options are still not enough. I would like more widget customization options, such as the ability to add a background image to the Live Chat widget.

review_title: 2 years strong
description: Very positive. The changing of hands in team members has been difficult, but the software is intuitive enough to be supportive independent of people at times.
author: Jen N.
pros: The team and the development of the tool. The people are incredible. They are helpful, involved, and genuinely enthusiastic.
cons: Being an early adopter, the best practices weren’t written well into our first few years and the software itself has gone through impressive, but drastic change.

review_title: Powerful Tool but needs care and feeding
description: We have booked meetings via Drift bot. We in marketing see the value for sure and will continue to use features and functionality as a part of our demand gen and ABM efforst.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the ability to set up multiple chat bots/playbooks based on use cases. The ability to engage with a target account real time is invaluable. So we're trying to keep it simple, yet also set up playbooks specific to our campaign objectives and quarterly themes but the up keep has proven to be challenging. The option to also use converstional pages is awesome and integrating those into ABM programs has been exciting.
cons: A lot of up keep required in the tool to keep it up to date and effective. Also need to train and remind sales teams often to close conversations and manage their bots. Drafting the right copy that will capture attention and encourage engagement has been hard so constantly testing and updating copy to improve bot performance

review_title: Awesome chatbot for engaging with potential customers
description: Overall, drift allows a simple and personable way to interact with potential customers that visit our website.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Super personable way to prospect and direct website visitors to pages. Drift saves a lot of time for the sales team while also providing a great experience for customers and potential customers.
cons: It may take a little bit of time to set up the chat bots if your site has multiple pages. However, the drift team is excellent in providing support through this.

review_title: A great product that wasn't afit for us
description: Great product that wasn't a fit for our buyers
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Drift was very easy to use. The conversation-building tool was fun to use and change. It is very well done.
cons: It didn't capture leads for us. I think our buyers hated the bot.

review_title: Great way to engage with prospect on your site!
description: Drift has allowed us to interact with folks browsing our website and capture valuable lead data that we didn't have access to before Drift.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Drift is really great for qualifying and chatting with clients that are browsing your website. The ability to create bots that capture data and qualify a prospect our SDR team a lot of time and allows them to only spend time on folks that are really ready to have a conversation. Their meeting scheduler tool is also really great.
cons: The backend admin panel can be a bit confusing at times. I'd also like them to work on their SalesForce integration more so custom fields can be captured in Drift and sent to SFDC.

review_title: So Much More Than a Simple Chatbot
description: We have made use of Drift to replace the standard static contact forms on a number of client sites in various, very different niches, including real estate, banking, recruiting and direct sales. The results have been very positive thus far. It is easier for live reps to follow up with leads, emails are not being missed or overlooked and the chatbots themselves add an interactive dimension that seems to be far more engaging for visitors
author: Melanie E.
pros: Drift is intuitive and adds value to almost any site. The application is currently running on several of my clients' sites (under my management) with great success. Case in point. A Realtor client began an interaction with a site visitor browsing for information on his market in general. Via Drift several conversations led to the sale of a home. No email contact form can match that!
cons: The iPhone app is not always as responsive as I'd like - better notifications would help - but on the whole, my experience with Drift so far has been overwhelmingly positive.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy chat set up right to your website
description: Great product. Free version is pretty limited, but gets the job done.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I found that drift has a very nice flow and design. It was very easy to set up, and I've seen a great increase in customer interaction from our website when i am able to engage them.
cons: Paid tiers are expensive. It looks like you get some great features through their paid services, but compared to other companies, they seem very expensive

review_title: Drift it's a great tool to automate your email marketing
description: until it as been great and we still work together
author: João A.
pros: Drift as a bunch of great features, we use it to filter out of office responses and also the web chat. It's a great tool and everyone should test it
cons: It can be a bit complicated and overwhelming since it as a lot of features

review_title: Immense ROI!
description: The overall experience has been really good. ROI is > 50X & it's very easy to operate on the tool.
author: Amit A.
pros: Easy to deploy, affordable pricing, good customer support & easy chat playbook creation.
cons: Nothing specific; everything seems top-notch!

review_title: Capitalize each visitor of your website
description: It has helped us connect better with prospects and customers visiting our website.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Drift is an intelligent way to get the most out of every visitor on your website. This leads to more sales and insights passed to our Sales and Customer Success team.
cons: Sometimes it thinks you are someone you are not. Most of the time everything works seamlessly though.

review_title: Great bot with plenty of options
description: If you consider a bot or other automated actions, Drift is certainly a great candidate that is worthwhile to explore.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Drift seems to have endless options and possibilities to enhance this bot and the underlying (marketing) actions. Their pro-active approach is helpful and really appreciated.
cons: Because of the many options and features, please make sure you to schedule enough time and focus for your dedicated Drift colleagues who implement, maintain and follow up on the additional tasks.
author_profession: Team lead Sales & Enterprise Account Executive

review_title: Great online chat function for sales
author: James P.
pros: Easy to work with prospects and have quick chats, quickly determine if someone is worth a sales conversation and if so turn it into a phone call quickly, otherwise give them free resources and send them away
cons: Would be better if different teams could have different queues based on locality of prospects, also the company is constantly changing the UI and features so it is hard to get used to certain functions, get a rhythm going
